heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 13370 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for carrying out this part, other than section 13362 of this title, such sums as may be necessary for fiscal years 1993 through 1998.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original “section 1322” and was translated as reading “section 1332” meaning , to reflect the probable intent of Congress, because does not contain a section 1322.Section 13362 of this titlesection 1332 of Pub. L. 102–486Pub. L. 102–486
